Top Party Places and Luxury Venues in Pune for Every Occasion

  1. Home
  2. Pune

1927 Top Party / Event Places and Wedding Function Venues in Pune

Pune is the perfect destination for all your celebrations, offering a seamless blend of modern sophistication and cultural charm. Whether it's a wedding, birthday, corporate gathering, or festive event, the city has a venue to match every occasion. Host your pre-wedding functions in an elegant banquet hall or enjoy a lively evening with loved ones at the vibrant cafés and restaurants. Take a post-event stroll through Pune’s fascinating museums and historical landmarks, adding a touch of culture to your celebration. For corporate parties, the lush party lawns in Kalyani Nagar provide an ideal setting, while NIBM Annexe is the perfect spot to host a grand party. With its diverse venues and dynamic atmosphere, Pune promises an unforgettable experience for every event. Plan your next celebration with us and make it truly special!Read more...

Hotel Sadanand Regency

More...

Hotel Sadanand Regency, Balewadi, Pune is located situated amongst the cozy locales of the Nr.Balewadi Sports Complex area, which makes it a perfect destination for your corporate events, weddings, and pious ceremonies. The banquet halls are so beautifully serenaded with glorious ambiance and magnificent décor which is guaranteed to provide you with a memorable time of your lives. Hotel Sadanand Regency as an inviting and contemporary ambiance, which makes your guests feel welcomed. It has luxurious rooms for your invitees which gives them a comfortable stay. Hotel Sadanand Regency has a banquet hall that is ideal for having an intimate and medium-sized function. 

Hotel Sadanand Regency, Pune also offers you a conference room for conducting meetings and seminars. Talented decorators from the venue ensure you a magical day by creating theme-based decorations. You can either opt for vegetarian or non-vegetarian cuisines depending on your culinary preference. The venue ensures you impeccable service along with very friendly and courteous staff for your comfort.

Aurum The Auditorium

More...

Aurum The Auditorium is a luxury event space carefully created to accommodate an extensive range of professional and social functions. It has a seating capacity for a maximum of 420 attendees and provides a generous and modern setting perfect for company promotions, corporate offsites, business seminars, product debuts, annual conferences, reunions, and corporate celebrations. The auditorium has advanced audio visual equipment, high definition projection facilities, and contemporary lighting technology, which ensures that every presentation and performance makes a lasting impression. Its seating area is well designed, with good visibility and comfort for all audience members, and is ideal for formal sessions as well as evening entertainment.

The interiors of Aurum The Auditorium are classy with their contemporary decor, sound treated walls, and high end furnishings that further complement the ambience. The event space also features flexible stage designs and adjustable event configurations that can accommodate different themes and functions. Whether its a networking session or an award show, each event here benefits from the effortless integration of professionalism and luxury.

From hosting a prominent business meeting or a vibrant corporate party, Aurum The Auditorium guarantees an exceptional experience that harmoniously blends sophistication, comfort, and functionality, making every event memorable and effective.

Share your details & get best suited venues for your event
The second-largest city in the state of Maharashtra, Pune is widely regarded as the state's cultural capital. It is home to one of the largest student populations, making the Pune's nightlife lively. It is also ranked number one in India in the ease of living. Being a fairly green city, Pune's temperature remains pleasant throughout the year. This comes off as a major reason why it is a top party place for many. Reasonable living and transportation costs are a plus-point for tourists and the city's inhabitants. With educational centres and IT companies at every corner of this city, Pune boasts off a young crowd that loves to party.

Planning events in Pune? Venuelook has the largest number of venue options from budget party places to luxury wedding venues. You may leave your venue and event requirements with us and we will do our best to recommend the best-suited venue and event themes for you to choose from. Every event experience is hand-curated by us, for you at events.venuelook.com.

Asking the internet for the best party places near me and getting no satisfactory answers? Venuelook has got all your answers in one place. Book your event/party now!

Sadanand Resorts

Rohit

Best banquet hall.. great management and tasty food

Usha Palace

Mallika

22nd Jan 23

Had my daughter's communion party at Hotel Supreme. The service was great. They took care of all the arrangements very well. The food was excellent and all the guests enjoyed themselves.

Hotel Supreme Heritage

Vishal

9th Nov 22

The staff was extremely cooperative at the time of discussions. They have a wide range of food options and live counters- all very appreciated by the guests. The decorator has a monopoly but she was very understanding and professional in her work. She got us exactly what we wanted in our budget.

Royal Orchid Golden Suites

Aftab Alam

9th Nov 22

We choose this venue for our engagement and it was very good. Their decorator- Priya did a superb job and catered to all my requirements. The food was yummy and very helpful staff.

E Square The Fern Hotel

Jojo

9th Nov 22

We were lucky to find this beautiful venue for our party in Pune. It turned out to be perfect for all events and everyone enjoyed a lot throughout. We appreciate all the services, arrangements and warm hospitality at the venue. Grateful and Thankful indeed! We'd surely recommend it to everyone

The Fern Residency

Rohit Mehta

17th Nov 20

Very great place, visited this rooftop tonight for family dinner. Great support by the owners, they managed to arrange table for the family in short notice without any reservations and the service was very good, constantly visited the table to check if we need anything! Coming to the food, everything we ordered turned out to be good !!

The Rooftop Project (trp)

Vaibhav Danve

16th Jan 20

The event was really good and food was also awesome. Also, I would like special thanks to all the staff who had given good service to us. This is the first party of our company. I specially recommend your hotel in the future. Thanks

Hotel Hindustan International

Yash Paranjape

13th Jan 20

We had booked banquet hall, Aura , at Deccan Randezvous for our daughter's first birthday party for around 20 people. I will rate this venue under different categories- Location - 5/5 Excellent location situated at centre if pune easily accessible from any part of pune. Facilities - 5/5 Top notch facilities. Valet parking, lift, wheelchair arrangements for old people, table arrangement, audio-visual instruments, deviations all were excellent. Only drawback was restrooms are located one floor below the hall. Food - 3/5 Starters, desserts, drinks, excellent. Main course was bit bland and monotonous. Service -3/5 As kitchen is situated on ground floor and hall is at 5th floor, service usually takes a bit time. As message to reach kitchen and then service to begin takes lot of time. Value for money - 2/5 Overall ₹875/+ taxes was bit too much as many other venues provide same for around ₹650. Overall 3/5 Recommended for conference, workshops but not for party.

Deccan Rendezvous

Tejas Belsare

30th Dec 19

We had not planned for such a spectacular event. It is rare that all facets of a event turn out to be perfect. This was a plus when booking a good venue. Venue look opened our venue options and raddison Blu was finilzed. Thanks for your help. 5 stars.

Hotel Radisson Blu
